draft:
Hi Mike,

Thank you for your email. We've received your payment confirmation via Zelle for the March work and will process it accordingly. Our records currently show a balance of $1800 for this.

Regarding the reports, they are typically sent at the end of the month. We will ensure you receive them promptly.

Best regards,
The Team
draft_rationale: The sender is the client and there are no flags that contradict the firm's records or require a conservative approach, so the draft confirms receipt of payment and provides information about the reports while stating the firm's recorded amount.
